hero.titolo:
A bright loft
steps from the sea
hero.sottotitolo: In the heart of the Adriatic Riviera, Samilla Loft is your modern retreat for seaside holidays, romantic weekends and remote working with views over the Adriatic.

apartment.label: The Apartment
apartment.descrizione: Samilla Loft is an entire modern and bright loft in the heart of Rimini, steps from the Adriatic beach. Carefully designed spaces, full amenities and a sea view that makes every morning special.

items.desc: Enjoy the Adriatic panorama directly from the loft
Explore Rimini by bike — two bicycles available
Fibre connection included — ideal for remote working
Radiant panels for maximum winter comfort

cards.desc: Samilla Loft is 2 minutes' walk from the beach. Wake up, grab the bikes and reach the sea — the perfect day starts like this.
Minutes from the loft you'll find the Tempio Malatestiano, the Arch of Augustus and Piazza Cavour — two thousand years of history within cycling distance.
Piadina flatbread, passatelli in broth, Sangiovese di Romagna. Traditional restaurants in the centre are 10 minutes' walk from the loft.

howItWorks.label: How to Book
howItWorks.titolo: Four steps and you're in Rimini

steps.desc: Check availability directly on Airbnb and choose your stay dates.
Protected payment via Airbnb. Receive instant confirmation by email.
Access the loft independently with a digital access code. No waiting.
Wake up with the scent of the sea, grab the bikes and start your Romagna adventure.

items.testo: Very clean apartment, fully equipped with everything you need (kitchen utensils, large TV, drying rack...). The location is excellent for getting around on foot — it's about 10 minutes' walk from the train station and faces directly onto the main promenade of Rimini Marina, full of bars and restaurants. The host was always very kind and ready to answer any question or need throughout the stay. 🔝 🔝 🔝

Fantastic apartment on the main street, with many bars and restaurants, very close to the beach. The host thought of everything — he even left us toothbrushes and wine. We would definitely come back...

location.label: Location
location.titolo: In the heart of the Riviera
location.desc: Samilla Loft is located on Viale Amerigo Vespucci, steps from the beach and the centre of Rimini. A strategic position for exploring all of Romagna.

host.label: Your Hosts
host.bio: We are Anna and Cesare, the founders of Lucea Collection. We carefully manage a selection of holiday apartments in Romagna, each chosen for its location, comfort and authenticity. For us every guest is unique, and our goal is for you to feel at home — or better still, even more comfortable.

finalCta.titolo: Ready for your stay in Rimini?
finalCta.sottotitolo: Check availability and book Samilla Loft directly on Airbnb.
